// room script file

#sectionstart room_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function room_a (){
  // script for room: Player enters screen (before fadein)
  character[GetPlayerCharacter()].x=1;
  SetCharacterView (GetPlayerCharacter (), 105);
  BeginCutscene (NO_CHAR);
  SetGlobalInt (1, NO_CUTSCENE);
  SetGlobalInt (160, 1);


}
#sectionend room_a  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE


#sectionstart room_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
function room_b (){
  // script for room: Player enters screen (after fadein)
  Wait (15);
  MoveCharacterBlocking (GetPlayerCharacter (), 500, 100, 0);
  Wait (30);
  if (GetGlobalInt (161) == 0)
  {
    DisplaySpeech (POLICE, "This is the Meteor Police.");
    Wait (40);
    DisplaySpeech (POLICE, "Uh huh...");
    DisplaySpeech (POLICE, "You found the murderous purple meteor?");
    DisplaySpeech (POLICE, "I'll be there in 5 minutes!");
    Wait (30);
    DisplaySpeech (POLICE, "Oh, make sure the lab is unlocked.");
    Wait (20);
    FaceLocation (POLICE, 600, 141);
    Wait (20);
    DisplaySpeech (POLICE, "As for you...");
    DisplaySpeech (POLICE, "...keep it under lightspeed!");
    SetGlobalInt (161, 1);
  }
  else if (GetGlobalInt (161) == 1)
  {
    DisplaySpeech (POLICE, "Ok, I'll come back, but this time unlock the lab!");
    SetGlobalInt (161, 2);
  }
  else if (GetGlobalInt (161) == 2)
  {
    DisplaySpeech (POLICE, "Enough! I'll come back one more time!");
    // SetGlobalInt(161,3);
  }
  SetOwnTimer (18, 1000);
  Wait (20);
  ObjectOff (0);
  FinishCutscene (0);
  ReleaseCharacterView (GetPlayerCharacter ());
  EnterRoom (15, 262, 132, DIR_UP);
}
#sectionend room_b  // DO NOT EDIT OR REMOVE THIS LINE
